1: And I will bless thy name for ever and ever.
2: And I will praise thy name for ever and ever.
3: And his greatness is is unsearchable.
4: And shall declare thy mighty acts.
6: And I will declare thy greatness.
7: And shall sing of thy righteousness.
8: Slow to anger, and of great mercy.
9: And his tender mercies are are over all his works.
10: And thy saints shall bless thee.
12: And the glorious majesty of his kingdom.
13: And thy dominion endureth endureth throughout all generations.
14: And raiseth up all those that be those that be bowed down.
15: And thou givest them their meat in due season.
16: And satisfiest the desire of every living thing.
17: And holy in all his works.
18: To all that call upon him in truth.
19: He also will hear their cry, and will save them.
20: But all the wicked will he destroy.
21: And let all flesh bless his holy name for ever and ever.
